note: Source-level mapping: what OWASP LLM category each corpus source primarily exercises. All sources are collections of ATTACK PROMPTS that try to elicit unsafe output, so the attack vector is LLM01 (Prompt Injection / jailbreak) for every source. `secondary` lists the documented harm focus of a source where it maps to another category. This is coarse, source-level intent; per-PROMPT harm classification (which fills each row's `taxonomy_hints`) is the next Phase-2 step and needs a classifier, not a lookup.

harmbench.focus: standardized harmful behaviors incl. chem/bio, cyber, misinformation

do_not_answer.focus: questions a model should refuse, across risk areas incl. privacy

beavertails.focus: QA labeled across harm categories incl. privacy and misinformation

lmsys_toxic.focus: toxic / jailbreaking user prompts from real traffic
